news.summary: OpenSea, a leading NFT marketplace, has requested the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to exempt NFT marketplaces from federal securities laws regulations. OpenSea's legal team emphasized that NFT marketplaces like theirs do not function as exchanges per US securities laws due to not executing transactions or acting as intermediaries. They have asked for informal guidance from the SEC, highlighting the need to clear up confusion in the industry. The SEC, in a notice on April 4, clarified that stablecoins meeting specific criteria are considered "non-securities." OpenSea's legal team also argued that NFT marketplaces should be exempt from registering as brokers since they do not provide investment advice or custody assets. The SEC, under the Trump administration, has started to relax its strict stance on crypto, dropping enforcement actions and probes against crypto firms, including OpenSea.
news.headline: OpenSea asks SEC to exclude NFT marketplaces from regulation as they don't meet exchange or broker criteria. SEC exempts stablecoins from transaction reports & memecoins from securities laws. OpenSea legal team requests informal guidance from SEC.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, CMB.TECH NV (traded on NYSE as CMBT and Euronext as CMBT) released its annual report for the year ended December 31, 2024, as required by Belgian law. The report is available on the Company’s website in the “Investors” section under “Annual and Financial Reports”.
news.headline: CMB.TECH releases annual report for year ended 12/31/2024, submits Form 20-F; listed on NYSE: CMBT & Euronext: CMBT.

news.summary: On April 17, 'De Ster' in The Hague, Netherlands, will unveil new soccer and hockey fields equipped with innovative features. The multi-sport complex will have cooling down systems and water management storage beneath the fields to enhance player experience. This development marks a significant investment in sports infrastructure, with the new facilities set to benefit athletes and spectators alike. The project signifies a step forward in modernizing sports amenities, with a focus on sustainability and performance.
news.headline: New multi-sport fields in The Hague with water storage and cooling system opening on 17 April 2025.

news.summary: In London, Chelsea Football Club has revealed a groundbreaking worldwide collaboration with FPT Corporation, Vietnam's premier technology solutions provider, known for aiding the digital transformations of major global organizations through AI-driven services and solutions. With inception in 1988, FPT has been pivotal in Vietnam's technological advancements. As a leading market player, FPT will contribute its cutting-edge technology and expertise to Chelsea FC's initiatives.
news.headline: Chelsea FC partners with FPT Corp for global tech transformation. FPT, Vietnam's top tech provider, founded in 1988. #CFC.

news.summary: In Tokyo on April 10, 2025, NTT Broadband Platform, Inc. launched the "Japan Wi-Fi auto-connect" app in December 2019. This app, known as "Japan Wi-Fi," seamlessly connects users to complimentary Wi-Fi services.
news.headline: NTTBP's "Japan Wi-Fi auto-connect" app connects users to free Wi-Fi in Japan for international visitors since Dec 2019.

news.summary: In Stockholm, Syncron, a prominent provider of cloud-based after-sales service solutions, has named Josh Weiss as the new Chief Executive Officer, taking over from Fritz Neumeyer. Neumeyer, known for driving substantial growth and innovation during his time, will be transitioning from his position. Weiss, with close to two decades of expertise in executive management within global technology and manufacturing companies, steps into his new role. Previously, he held the position of President.
news.headline: Syncron appoints Josh Weiss as CEO, succeeding Fritz Neumeyer, with nearly 20 years of experience in technology and manufacturing.

news.summary: A recent study revealed that the global sales of smartphones have surpassed 1.5 billion units in the first half of 2021, marking a 10% increase compared to the same period last year. The research also indicated that Android devices accounted for approximately 80% of these sales, with Samsung leading the market share at 30%, followed by Apple with 25%. Additionally, it was found that the average selling price of smartphones decreased by 2% during this period. Experts attribute the growth in sales to the increasing demand for 5G-enabled phones and the gradual economic recovery from the pandemic. The smartphone market is expected to continue its upward trajectory in the coming months as more consumers prioritize connectivity and technology in their daily lives.
news.headline: Company buys back 1 million of its own shares.

news.summary: AS Merko Ehitus, with registry code 11520257 and headquarters at Järvevana tee 9G, Tallinn, 11314, will hold its annual general meeting of shareholders on Thursday, May 15, 2025, at 10:00 at the Nordic Hotel Forum conference center located at Viru square 3, Tallinn.
news.headline: AS Merko Ehitus will hold its Annual General Meeting on May 15, 2025, at 10:00 am in Tallinn.

news.summary: MaxCyte, Inc., a prominent cell-engineering company listed on the NASDAQ (MXCT) and LSE (MXCT), has revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for the initial quarter of 2025 after the closing of the U.S. markets on May 7th, 2025. The company will hold a conference call at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day for management to analyze the financial results.
news.headline: MaxCyte will report Q1 2025 financial results on May 7, 2025; conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET.

news.summary: A new dashboard has been introduced by Fintech company Block, Inc. (NYSE: XYZ) to assist businesses in managing their Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) holdings. Founded by Jack Dorsey, the company unveiled an open-source toolkit tailored for the expanding Bitcoin treasury management sector. Included in the toolkit are features like a corporate holdings dashboard and a BTC-to-USD real-time price quote API, allowing companies to track the dollar value of their holdings in real time. Block is also considering incorporating capabilities such as time-stamped historical value lookup for quarter-end reporting. The objective behind this initiative is to simplify the process for companies wishing to integrate Bitcoin into their financial portfolios.
news.headline: Fintech firm Block, Inc. launched a dashboard to help companies manage their Bitcoin holdings, easing treasury management.
ECB's Villeroy: I do not expect French economic recession.

news.summary: XRP peaked at $3.40 on Jan. 16, 2025, dropping 46% in the past three months. Despite this, 81.6% of its circulating supply is in profit. Tron (TRX) has a higher profitable supply at 84.6%, while Bitcoin (BTC), Ether (ETH), and Solana (SOL) stand at 76.8%, 44.9%, and 31.6% respectively. Korean traders' sentiment on XRP has shifted, leading to $120 million in net sales of XRP between April 6-7. Heavy selling by long-term whales and diminished retail confidence is evident, with over $1 billion in positions offloaded at an average price of $2.10. XRP's higher time frame chart hit a yearly low of $1.61 on April 7 but rebounded to $2 on April 9. Despite this, a bearish market structure is seen, potentially leading to a prolonged correction period. Key demand zone is between $1.63 and $1.27. Ripple acquired Hidden Road for $1.25B. Note: Article does not offer investment advice.
news.headline: 81.6% of XRP supply in profit, but Korean traders turn bearish. XRP at $3.40 on Jan. 16, 2025 drops 46% in 3 months. Other profitable supplies: TRX - 84.6%, BTC - 76.8%, ETH - 44.9%, SOL - 31.6%. Korean traders sell $120 million XRP between April 6-7. XRP's high time frame chart shows bearish trend, might drop to $1.27-$1.63. Risk involved in investment decisions.

ECB's Villeroy: Protectionism remains a bad element for American economy.
ECB's Villeroy: Trump's tariff pause decision is less bad news but still bad news elements out there in America.

news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has increased to 6.2%, with a total of 10.3 million people currently unemployed. This rise in unemployment is largely attributed to the ongoing economic challenges caused by the global pandemic. Additionally, the job market saw a decrease of 150,000 jobs in the past month, further exacerbating the situation. The government is continuing to implement measures to support those affected by job losses and the overall economic downturn.
news.headline: Markets surge as Trump delays most tariff hikes.

news.summary: Bitwise, a prominent crypto investment firm, maintains its bold prediction of Bitcoin reaching $200,000 by the end of the year. Chief Investment Officer Matt Hougan believes escalating global trade tensions, particularly US President Trump's push for a weaker dollar, could benefit Bitcoin and crypto. Hougan cites a speech criticizing the dollar's reserve status and emphasizes the historical correlation between dollar weakness and Bitcoin strength. The US Dollar Index has fallen over 7% since 2025 began. Hougan also foresees a shift towards alternative reserve assets like Bitcoin and gold due to disruptions in the global currency system, potentially leading to a more fragmented reserve system. Recent reports suggest China and Russia are settling energy trades in Bitcoin amidst the trade war with the US. Bitcoin has shown resilience in the market, up 7.5% to $81,700 in the past 24 hours despite a 32% correction from its previous all-time high. The economic uncertainty could drive further adoption of Bitcoin as a hedge against global volatility.
news.headline: Bitwise stands firm on $200K Bitcoin forecast amid trade tensions; predicts BTC may rise post weakened dollar. BTC is up 7.5%, now at $81,700.
"Analyzing Trump's strategy using game theory, article discusses his approach as a bully or a chicken."
Haslinda Amin gives insight on 04/10/2025 at Bloomberg.com.

news.summary: The Global Intramedullary Nail Market was valued at USD 920.4 million in 2025 and is projected to reach USD 1,537 million by 2032, growing at a CAGR of 7.6%. North America is expected to be the largest market with over USD 329.35 million in 2025, driven by the growing geriatric population. The trochanteric nails segment holds the largest market share due to their use in hip fracture fixation procedures. Europe is the second-largest market with over USD 264.91 million in 2025, supported by key players and reimbursement policies. The market is expected to experience significant growth due to factors like rising fracture incidence and market players' presence.
news.headline: Global Intramedullary Nail Market valued at USD 920.4 million in 2025; projected to reach USD 1,537 million by 2032, growing at 7.6% CAGR. North America expected to lead with over USD 329.35 million market share in 2025. Europe second-largest market with USD 264.91 million market share. Trochanteric nails segment holds largest market share.

news.summary: As the Australian government takes steps to tackle the issue of individuals being debanked, the CEO of Westpac has issued an apology. This move comes amidst growing concerns about financial exclusion, with a significant number of people being affected. The CEO's apology signals recognition of the seriousness of the situation and a commitment to addressing the issue. The Australian government's response to debanking issues highlights the importance of ensuring access to essential financial services for all citizens.
news.headline: Westpac CEO apologizes for freezing customer funds over Bitcoin transfer as government tackles debanking.

news.summary: Insight Health, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven healthcare solutions, has recently revealed a key development in collaboration with Office Practicum, a leading provider of electronic health record (EHR) solutions tailored for pediatrics. The partnership aims to combine Insight Health's cutting-edge AI technology with Office Practicum's extensive pediatric knowledge and substantial clinical data pool. This initiative will result in the creation of a specialized AI documentation assistant customized for pediatric processes. Through this strategic partnership, Insight Health and Office Practicum are set to revolutionize pediatric healthcare workflows by incorporating advanced AI capabilities.
news.headline: Insight Health and Office Practicum partner to revolutionize pediatric documentation with AI, advancing healthcare efficiency.

news.summary: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (Nasdaq: FFAI) shared that it took part in the Jones Technology and Innovation Conference at The Venetian Resort in Las Vegas. The California-based company, known for its global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem, had its Global President, Jerry Wang, as a guest speaker. The event was investor-focused and provided a platform for Wang to deliver a speech to the audience in attendance.
news.headline: Jerry Wang, Global President of Faraday Future, spoke at Jones Technology and Innovation Conference in Las Vegas. Faraday Future is a California-based intelligent electric mobility company.

news.summary: A recent report by Northern Trust, conducted through a survey of 180 asset owners worldwide, highlights investment portfolios of varying sizes, spanning from $1 billion to more than $500 billion. The study provides insights into asset allocation decisions among these global allocators.
news.headline: Northern Trust's report examines priorities of 180 global asset owners with portfolios from $1B to over $500B.

news.summary: The recent sell-off in Ether (ETH) led to a loss of the crucial $1,500 support level, suggesting a potential deeper correction ahead. Ether's price dropped below its realized price, signaling bearish momentum. Previous instances of this led to significant price drops, like the 51% fall after the Terra Luna crash in June 2022. Weakness is also seen in Spot Ethereum ETF flows, with $94.1 million outflows over two weeks. The lack of investor interest is reflected across Ether products, with $37.4 million outflows from Ethereum investment funds. Additionally, low open interest, negative funding rates, and declining network activity indicate further downside potential for ETH, potentially bottoming at $1,000. Competing layer-1 blockchains are gaining traction as Ethereum's market share faces challenges. This article does not provide investment advice.
news.headline: Ethereum struggles as price falls: Reasons include low ETF flows, weak derivatives market, and competition from other blockchains.
F1's costly return to Africa faces challenges.

news.summary: In Bern, Switzerland, Mondelēz International (Nasdaq: MDLZ) has unveiled a substantial investment totaling approximately 65 million Swiss Francs into its Toblerone manufacturing plant. This move aims to establish a worldwide center of excellence for Toblerone in Bern, Switzerland, enhancing the export of the brand and chocolate knowledge globally. This investment underscores the company's dedication to the birthplace of Toblerone in 1908.
news.headline: Mondelēz invests ~65 million CHF in Toblerone facility in Bern, creating global excellence center for brand export.

news.summary: In the latest report, it has been stated that the global unemployment rate has reached 5.7%, with around 197 million people unemployed. The report also highlighted that there has been a decrease in youth unemployment, which now stands at 11.7%. In addition, it was noted that the average duration of unemployment is 20 weeks. The report emphasized the need for countries to implement policies that promote job creation and support those who are unemployed. It also suggested focusing on upskilling and reskilling programs to enhance employment opportunities.
news.headline: Fagron to unveil new growth plan and financial goals for 2025 at Capital Markets Day.

news.summary: A partnership has been formed to develop a top-tier integrated refining and petrochemical complex in Yanbu Industrial City, Saudi Arabia. This initiative comes on the 10th anniversary of the Yanbu Refinery joint venture. One of the collaborators is China Petroleum & Chemical Corporation, also known as Sinopec. The project is set to enhance the refining and petrochemical capabilities in the area. This collaboration represents a significant milestone towards establishing a world-class industrial facility. The news was released on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: Sinopec and Aramco to expand Yanbu Refinery, 10th year collaboration. Aim to create world-class complex.

news.summary: China's government issued cautions to its citizens concerning travel to the U.S. due to worsening bilateral relations amidst escalating trade tensions. Beijing announced intentions to increase reciprocal tariffs on American products from 34% to 84%, in response to President Donald Trump's recent tariff increases on Chinese goods. The Ministry of Culture and Tourism advised Chinese tourists to evaluate risks carefully, attributing the warning to deteriorating Sino-U.S. economic relations and security concerns within the U.S. This measure came in light of the ongoing trade dispute between the two countries.
news.headline: China warns citizens against US travel citing worsening relations and increased security risks, and raised reciprocal tariffs on American goods to 84% from 34% in response to Trump's recent tariff hikes on Chinese products.
BOJ offers to provide government debt immediately (afternoon offer)

news.summary: Magic Eden, a Solana NFT marketplace, acquires crypto trading app Slingshot to expand offerings beyond NFTs amidst market downturn. Magic Eden now supports over 8M tokens across major blockchains. Slingshot boasts nearly 1M users with access to tokens on 10 blockchains using a universal USDC balance. Magic Eden aims to attract more users from centralized exchanges to on-chain platforms. In 2024, Magic Eden made $75M from its NFT marketplace, plans to increase with Slingshot. NFT marketplaces like DraftKings and GameStop closing due to declining volumes. NFT market has seen $1.6B in sales across 14M transactions in 2025, less than $8.9B in 2024. Monthly sales volume declining in 2025.
news.headline: Magic Eden, the Solana NFT marketplace, acquires Slingshot to broaden beyond NFTs amid market downturn. Source confirms.

news.summary: On a recent episode of CNBC's "Mad Money Lightning Round," Jim Cramer recommended purchasing GRAIL, Inc. (NASDAQ: GRAL), expressing a strong preference for the stock. This sentiment was echoed by Morgan Stanley analyst Tejas Savant, who on March 18, increased the price target for GRAL from $16 to $20. Cramer expressed hesitation regarding Turkcell Iletisim Hizmetleri A.S. (NYSE: TKC), likening it to a risky gamble, stating it was too speculative for his liking. In terms of earnings, Turkcell reported a fiscal year net profit of 23.52 billion Lira, a notable increase from the previous year's profit of 18.13 billion Lira, during a disclosure on Feb. 27. When discussing Block, Inc. (NYSE: XYZ), Cramer advised initiating a half position immediately, with the possibility of buying more if the stock price dips below 53. Additionally, Keefe, Bruyette & Woods analyst Vasundhara Govil upgraded Block from Market Perform to Outperform on March 18. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Jim Cramer recommends buying GRAIL, Inc. with Morgan Stanley raising its price target to $20. Jim expressed concerns about Turkcell Iletisim Hizmetleri A.S. and suggested a cautious approach for Block, Inc. Vasundhara Govil upgraded Block to Outperform.
Taiwan auction attracts bids for 1.77 times notes on offer
